task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Ford Mustang (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $31920.00 and wholesale is $23092.00. Product features: American muscle car with 2.3L EcoBoost or 5.0L V8 engine options. Reference: https://www.ford.com/cars/mustang/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Ford Mustang. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Ford Mustang. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
